indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: The open floor area allows for unobstructed movement and stretching.

indicators.name: minimal furniture
indicators.rationale: The minimal furniture arrangement minimizes obstructions and clutter on the floor.

indicators.name: natural light from skylights
indicators.rationale: Natural light from skylights can create a calming atmosphere conducive to yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching due to the presence of minimal furniture and an open floor area, but it lacks the ideal conditions for a full yoga practice, such as a dedicated yoga mat and a full-length mirror.
